description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2022 Mercedes-Benz SL 55 AMG 4MATIC+, 4.0 TT V8, AWD, 469 bhp, 9-Speed Dual-Clutch Automatic. AED 409,000 or AED 6,408 / Month with a 20% Down payment for 5 Years. 
 - Mileage 29,794 KMs - Mercedes Warranty Valid Until 12th July 2028 or 105,000 KMs - Mercedes Service Contract Valid Until 12th July 2028 or 105,000 KMs - Full Agency Service History - GCC Specs 
 - Monza Grey Magno Paint - Full PPF - LED Headlights with Adaptive Highbeam - Power Retractable soft-top roof - Active Aerodynamics - Interior Carbon Fiber Trim - Premium leather upholstery interior - Heated and ventilated seats (front) - Massage Seats - Dual-zone automatic climate control - MBUX with dual 12.3-inch screens - Touchpad and Voice Control - Apple CarPlay - Android Auto - Ambient Lighting - Burmester 3D Surround Sound System - Wireless charging - Heads-up display - Active Brake Assist - Blind Spot Assist - Active Lane Keeping Assist - Distronic Plus (Adaptive Cruise Control) - Surround View System - Parktronic with Active Parking Assist - AMG Performance Exhaust System with electronically controlled flaps - AMG Sport Steering Wheel with Nappa leather and brushed aluminum paddle shifters - Steering wheel with Touch Control Buttons - Power-adjustable steering column - Keyless Go
